home.hero_subtitle: Join thousands of fundraisers creating impact across India
home.featured_subtitle: Featured campaigns making real impact with clear stories and transparent progress.
home.faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know about launching and funding your campaign successfully.
home.faq_a1: You can create and publish a campaign in minutes once you have your story, goal, timeline, and media ready.
home.faq_a2: Raise has no platform fee on donations. Standard payment processing fees may apply once live payments are enabled.
home.faq_q3: Can I fundraise in multiple categories?
home.faq_a3: Yes, you can create multiple campaigns across different categories. Each campaign is managed independently with its own analytics and funding goal.
home.faq_q4: What tools do campaign creators get?
home.faq_a4: Creators get campaign editing, media uploads, a dashboard, donation analytics, supporter visibility, and optional featured placement.
home.faq_q5: What payment methods do you accept?
home.faq_a5: Razorpay is used for secure payment collection and verification.
home.cta_title: Ready to Turn Your Dream Into Reality?
home.cta_subtitle: Join thousands of successful campaigners who have raised millions with Raise. Start your journey in just 2 minutes.

create.title: Create a New Campaign
create.subtitle: Share your vision and start raising funds for your project
create.title_placeholder: Give your campaign a clear, compelling title (10–100 characters)
create.description_placeholder: Tell your story. Explain what you're raising funds for, why it matters, and how funds will be used. (50–5000 characters)
create.media_upload_info: Images up to 5 MB · Videos up to 100 MB · Multiple files allowed
create.feature_description: Get pinned at the top of Browse Campaigns with a Featured badge while payment testing is disabled.
create.feature_unavailable: Featured placement is available for testing without payment.
create.error_title_min: Title must be at least 10 characters.
create.error_title_max: Title must be 100 characters or fewer.
create.error_desc_min: Description must be at least 50 characters.
create.error_desc_max: Description must be 5,000 characters or fewer.
create.error_goal_min: Funding goal must be at least ₹100.
create.error_image_size: Cover image must be under 5 MB.
create.error_image_upload: Cover image upload failed. You can paste a URL instead.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A focused crowdfunding platform connecting campaign creators with supporters to turn urgent needs and meaningful ideas into reality.
about.powering_desc: Raise brings campaign creation, public discovery, donor updates, and creator analytics into one practical fundraising workspace.
about.mission_p1: We believe every credible cause deserves a clear way to reach supporters. Raise makes campaign creation, sharing, and tracking straightforward for individuals and communities.
about.mission_p2: Our tools help creators present their story, add media, monitor donor activity, and keep momentum as their campaign grows.
about.mission_box_desc: Structured campaign pages, media support, progress tracking, and creator analytics help supporters understand the cause.
about.pricing_desc: We believe in transparency. Here's exactly what you'll pay and how our platform works.
about.pricing_platform_desc: No platform fees on donations. Keep 100% of what you raise (minus payment processing).
about.pricing_payment_desc: Industry-standard payment gateway fees for secure transactions.
about.pricing_premium_desc: Optional premium placement on homepage for increased visibility and donations.
about.feature_setup_desc: Use clear prompts and structured fields to tell your story, set a goal, and prepare a stronger campaign.
about.feature_security_desc: Supabase authentication, row-level security, and creator-owned dashboards help protect account and campaign data.
about.feature_speed_desc: Launch your campaign in just 2 minutes with our intuitive, guided process.
about.feature_global_desc: Connect with supporters across India and worldwide.
about.feature_analytics_desc: Track every metric that matters with detailed dashboards and actionable insights.
about.feature_community_desc: Join a thriving ecosystem of creators, supporters, and changemakers.
about.calc_subtitle: See exactly how much you'll receive from your campaign
about.cta_final_desc: Every dream funded is a step towards creating positive change. Join our community of changemakers today.

feature_modal.title: Feature Your Campaign
feature_modal.subtitle: Preview featured placement without payment while Razorpay is disabled.
feature_modal.perk_1: Pinned at the top of Browse Campaigns
feature_modal.perk_2: Featured badge on your campaign card
